selected_tasks.expected_evidence: Next trajectory snapshot shows `open_after_FailureObserved=0`. State doctor / `yyds state why` no longer shows unmatched FailureObserved events. Dashboard run lifecycle counts are correct. Implementation Notes: The fix is in `close_orphaned_run_if_needed` at line 323 in `src/state.rs`. Current behavior: scans backward from end of events file, stops at first
selected_tasks.title: Close all orphaned FailureObserved runs, not just the most recent dangling one
